page_state: LOGIN PAGE — gamma.app/signin?redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fgamma.app%2Fcreate%2Fgenerate; tab title 'Gamma'; renders Korean '로그인' heading with 'Google로 계속하기' button, email/password inputs, '비밀번호를 잊으셨나요?' link, and '로그인' submit button; Cookie consent overlay also present (Reject All / Accept All)

helper_status.reason: Could not run helper-key DevTools probe — login wall blocked access to /create/generate where the contenteditable composer (and any APF helper hooks) would live. Probe deferred until session is authenticated.

wss_observations.reason: No SSE/WSS streams to observe — generate flow never initiated due to auth wall.

contenteditable_interaction.reason: Login redirect occurred before /create/generate composer rendered; no div[contenteditable="true"][role="textbox"] in DOM to target. Cannot test the #939-discovered ProseMirror/Lexical contenteditable interaction pattern under this auth state.

diagnosis.issue: Browser session for gamma.app is not authenticated. Navigating directly to https://gamma.app/create/generate triggers an immediate server-side redirect (302) to /signin, where the user is presented with Google OAuth + email/password login. Test framework has no credentials to satisfy this gate.
diagnosis.comparison_to_939: #939 sub-agent discovered the contenteditable pattern AFTER successfully reaching /create/generate. That session must have been authenticated (cookie still warm) at the time. The current session lacks (or has expired) that auth cookie, so we never reach the page where the dual-template (gamma_sse_v7 + gamma_render_generation_json_v1) would have a chance to render the warning.
diagnosis.dual_template_verification_status: INCONCLUSIVE for the engine+template pair — cannot confirm or deny that gamma_sse_v7 (SSE block) and gamma_render_generation_json_v1 (slide content replace) still work post-changes, because no SSE generate request was made. The dual-template render path is gated by reaching the composer, which is gated by login.
diagnosis.next_action_recommendation: Either (a) restore a logged-in gamma.app session in this Chrome profile (Google OAuth via plantynetaitest@gmail.com), (b) provide test credentials for the worker to drive the login form, or (c) configure a guest/anonymous flow if Gamma offers one. Until auth is in place, autonomous warning verification of gamma cannot proceed past this point.

notes: FAIL_AUTH — login wall blocks direct access to /create/generate. URL bar confirmed: gamma.app/signin?redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fgamma.app%2Fcreate%2Fgenerate. contenteditable submit was NOT attempted (no composer in DOM). dual-template warning render was NOT triggered (no SSE request initiated). Compared to #939 which successfully discovered the contenteditable pattern, this session lacks the auth cookie #939 implicitly relied on.
